ogTitle: Brawboy vs Brays Creek: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Brawboy and Brays Creek.
heading: Brawboy vs Brays Creek — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Brawboy, New South Wales and Brays Creek, New South Wales. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Brawboy has a lower overall climate risk score (36/100) compared to Brays Creek (38/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Brawboy or Brays Creek safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Brawboy has a flood risk score of 24/100, while Brays Creek scores 45/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Brawboy scores 43/100 for bushfire risk. Brays Creek scores 16/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Brawboy or Brays Creek?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Brawboy has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.2% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
